title: Moroccan Darija Translation
description: A complete resource pack that translates Minecraft's language into authentic Moroccan Darija (Moroccan Arabic dialect).
body:
https://bou33ou.com
# 🌟 Minecraft B’Darija (ماينكرافت بالدارجة)

Welcome to the **Moroccan Darija Translation Pack**!

This resource pack localizes the entire Minecraft experience, bringing the familiar and authentic voice of Moroccan Darija (الدارجة المغربية) right into your game.

Forget complex translations—now you can play Minecraft with words and phrases that sound just like home! (If you are Moroccan, of course! :p)

## ⚡ Recommended: The Complete Set
For the full, immersive Moroccan Minecraft experience, I strongly recommend using these 3 packs together:
* **Arabic Vanilla-Style Font:** [Arabic Vanilla-Style Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arabic-font)
* **Moroccan Darija Translation:** [Darija Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-in-moroccan-darija)
* **Arabic Title Logo:** [Arabic MINECRAFT LOGO](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arabic-logo)

## ✨ Key Translations

Every part of the game has been carefully translated, including:

* **Items & Blocks:** All items, blocks, and tools have been renamed.
* **Menu & GUI:** The main menus, settings, and inventory are all in Darija.
* **Mobs & Entities:** Names of all creatures and villagers are localized.
* **In-Game Messages:** Chat messages, tips, and tutorial text are now in Darija.

## 🤝 Community Note & Improvement

I am actively working to make the translation better by choosing the right words that are easy to understand.

If you have a suggestion for a better translation for any word or Item name, please let me know! I will add it in the next update.

## 🤝 How to Use

1.  Download the resource pack ZIP file.
2.  Install it in your `resourcepacks` folder and enable it.
3.  In Minecraft's Language settings, choose the new **Moroccan Darija** option.

## 🇲🇦 Share the Experience!

This pack is a must-have for players in Morocco and the greater Maghreb region who want a truly local gaming experience.
